title: MeineKrafter Client+
description: Originally made for the MeineKrafter SMP Server, this modpack is also perfect for your own SMP world or even casual solo play. It enhances the vanilla experience with a wide range of clientside-only mods that keep things simple, beautiful, and smooth.
body:
**A lightweight but powerful clientside modpack that upgrades your Minecraft experience without losing the vanilla feel.**

Originally made for the **MeineKrafter SMP Server**, this modpack is also perfect for your own SMP world or even casual solo play. It enhances the **vanilla experience** with a wide range of **clientside-only** mods that keep things simple, beautiful, and smooth.

## ✨What to expect:

- **Better** performance
- Loads of **helpful** features
- polished for a **smoother** gameplay
- Tons of **quality-of-life** improvements
- Enhanced **visuals** that stay true to vanilla
- Fully **server-compatible** (no server-side installation needed!)

If you love vanilla Minecraft but wish it just felt better to play - this is for you :)

## 🔗Copyright information:

- The resourcepack "Evil Tweaks" was created with [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/).
